_publications._publicationTitle: The German version of the neurofibromatosis 2 impact on quality of life questionnaire correlates with severity of depression and physician-reported disease severity.

_contextSnippet: The median overall score ± SD for the PHQ-9 questionnaire was 7 ± 5.4.
details: Median overall score 7 ± 5.4 in NF2 patient population
